commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is contributor after-fix Discord proof and maintainer validation, not a narrow automated code repair.; Cleared: The diff only touches channel lifecycle logic, Discord handling, docs, and tests; it does not add dependencies, workflows, permissions, secrets handling, or code execution paths. commands.review_summary:
Adds a live-preview adapter option to retain drafts during normal fallback delivery, wires Discord to use it for error finals and same-turn prior replies, and updates focused tests plus streaming docs.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: on current main, a Discord partial preview followed by an error final skips preview finalization, delivers normally, and then clears the draft; a tool delivery marks the turn as replied but current main can still edit over the preview on the later final.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor after-fix Discord proof and maintainer validation, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: [codex] Fix Discord error finals clearing previews
target.body:
## Summary Discord preview streaming can leave an already-visible draft/progress preview in Discord while the same agent run later falls back to normal delivery. Two fallback cases were clearing or editing that preview after it was visible: - error finals used normal delivery, then the shared live-preview fallback cleared the draft - tool/error replies delivered earlier in the same turn allowed the later normal final to edit over the visible preview This adds an adapter opt-in for retaining already-visible draft previews during normal fallback delivery, wires Discord to retain drafts for error finals and same-turn replies that already delivered something, and updates the streaming docs. ## Verification - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/message/lifecycle.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts` - `git diff --check` `pnpm tsgo:prod` was attempted on the PR branch, but pnpm entered dependency reconciliation and hung in `pnpm install` while retrying optional package downloads. I stopped that stuck spawned process after the focused tests had already passed. ## Real behavior proof Before-fix proof: A private OpenClaw 2026.5.19-beta.1 Discord gateway screen recording captured this exact behavior: Dicky posted partial preview text, a canvas tool failure was delivered, then the later final response edited/replaced the visible preview text instead of preserving it as prior visible output. Corroborating gateway logs from the same run show two tool failures: - `[tools] canvas failed: node required raw_params={"action":"present","url":"data:text/html,

test

"}` - `[tools] canvas failed: node required raw_params={"action":"present","url":"data:text/html,

another test for the PR

"}` Runtime hotpatch evidence: The private beta gateway was patched with the compiled equivalent of this PR, including the broadened same-turn reply guard. The installed Discord message-handler chunk was backed up, patched, syntax-checked with `node --check`, and `openclaw-gateway.service` was restarted. Post-hotpatch health: `openclaw gateway status` reports OpenClaw 2026.5.19-beta.1, runtime running, connectivity probe ok, admin-capable, and listening on the configured loopback gateway port. What still needs live smoke: Re-running the same Discord canvas repro after the second hotpatch should show the partial preview preserved and the tool/final deliveries sent separately, with no later edit replacing the visible preview.
